tasks.subject: Task 1: Format v1 — slim manifest + binary header
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Container format goes to v1 (version byte 0x01). Binary header gains scrambler-table SHA-256. Manifest drops 9 redundant fields and nests hashes. Tool version bumps to "miniscram 1.0.0".

**Files:** manifest.go, cue.go, pack.go, unpack.go, verify.go, inspect.go, plus all *_test.go that construct Manifest/Track literals.

**Verify:** go test ./...

Full steps in plan section "Task 1".

```json:metadata
{"files": ["manifest.go", "cue.go", "pack.go", "unpack.go", "verify.go", "inspect.go", "pack_test.go", "unpack_test.go", "verify_test.go", "inspect_test.go", "manifest_test.go", "e2e_redump_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["containerVersion is 0x01", "scrambler hash in binary header", "slim manifest fields only", "nested hashes", "tool version 1.0.0", "tests green"]}
```

tasks.description:

tasks.description:

tasks.subject: Task 10: Test architecture — fixtures, e2e matrix, CLI sweep
tasks.description:

**Files:** fixtures_test.go, e2e_test.go, cli_test.go (renamed from main_test.go), pack_test.go, unpack_test.go, verify_test.go, inspect_test.go.

**Verify:** go test -cover ./...

```json:metadata

```
